tasks.title: Fix CSP to allow inline importmap
tasks.description: Add a Content-Security-Policy header in nginx.conf that includes the SHA-256 hash of the inline importmap script, allowing it to execute.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: The game loads successfully without CSP errors. The inline importmap is allowed via its SHA-256 hash. Docker build succeeds.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Fix CSP Inline Script Block

You are fixing a CSP (Content Security Policy) issue that prevents the game from loading.

## Codebase

Pure static HTML+JS served by nginx in Docker. No npm, no build step.

- `index.html` — Main page with inline `<style>`, inline `<script type="importmap">`, and external module `<script type="module" src="js/main.js">`
- `nginx.conf` — Nginx config serving on port 8080
- `Dockerfile` — Docker build

## Problem

A CSP directive `script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net` blocks the inline `<script type="importmap">`. The importmap MUST remain inline (browsers don't support external importmaps).

## Fix

Add a `Content-Security-Policy` header in `nginx.conf` inside the `server` block (before the location blocks) that allows:
- Scripts from `'self'` and `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net`
- The inline importmap via hash: `'sha256-Cb7VRvgKHYvwTusy6WvuTr1ww8fUTjYTnEACYzG5a/8='`
- Inline styles via `'unsafe-inline'` (the page has an inline `<style>` block)

Add this line inside the `server { }` block, before the `location` directives:

```nginx
add_header Content-Security-Policy "script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net 'sha256-Cb7VRvgKHYvwTusy6WvuTr1ww8fUTjYTnEACYzG5a/8='; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self';" always;
```

## Verification

- Run `docker build -t teeter .` — must succeed (nginx -t validates config)
- The CSP header should appear in HTTP responses

## Conventions
- Match existing nginx.conf indentation (4 spaces)
- Keep the change minimal — only add the CSP header line

## IMPORTANT
- Do NOT modify index.html
- Do NOT change the importmap content (changing it would invalidate the hash)
- The hash `sha256-Cb7VRvgKHYvwTusy6WvuTr1ww8fUTjYTnEACYzG5a/8=` has been verified against the exact importmap content

checklist.description: Add CSP header to nginx.conf with importmap hash
steps: Add Content-Security-Policy header with sha256 hash inside server block
Verify nginx config syntax via docker build

checklist.description: Docker build succeeds with updated nginx config
steps: Verify build completes without errors (nginx -t passes)

quality_checklist.description: CSP header is correctly formatted and includes all needed directives
steps: Check that script-src includes 'self', cdn.jsdelivr.net, and the importmap hash
Check that style-src allows inline styles
Verify no overly permissive directives like 'unsafe-eval'

checks.description: Game loads without CSP errors — the loading screen progresses past 'Loading...' and the 3D scene renders
steps: Verify no CSP violation errors in console
Verify the Three.js scene renders (canvas visible, not stuck on loading)
